sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Oppianus Apamensis</hi> Epicus [Opp.] <date TEIform="date">iii A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">C. = Cynegetica,</title_> ed. P. Boudreaux, Paris 1908. (<title_ TEIform="title">Ix. = Ixeutica,</title_> only in paraphrase; v. Dionysius.) Scholia in Oppianum, ed. U. C. Bussemaker, Paris (D.) 1847.</item>
